mapper.select: select t.id as instanceId,t.userId,t.beginTime,t.endTime,t.createTime,t.title,t.description,t.priority,t.repeatable,t.state, r.id,r.period,r.periodUnit,r.count,r.deadline,r.custom,i.taskId as taskId from Task t join TaskInstance i on i.instanceId = t.id and i.instanceId = i.taskId left join TaskRepeatRule r on t.id = r.taskId where t.userId=#{userId} and (( ((t.beginTime>=#{leftBound} and t.beginTime<#{rightBound}) or (t.endTime>=#{leftBound} and t.endTime<#{rightBound})) and t.repeatable=0) or t.repeatable=1)

select t.id as instanceId,t.userId,t.beginTime,t.endTime,t.createTime,t.title,t.description,t.priority,t.repeatable,t.state, r.id,r.period,r.periodUnit,r.count,r.deadline,r.custom,i.taskId as taskId from Task t join TaskInstance i on i.instanceId = t.id left join TaskRepeatRule r on t.id = r.taskId where t.userId=#{userId} and ( (t.beginTime>=#{leftBound} and t.beginTime<#{rightBound}) or (t.endTime>=#{leftBound} and t.endTime<#{rightBound}) ) and (t.id in (select instanceId from TaskInstance where taskId=#{taskId}))
